formulas.name: Content
formulas.formula:
```json
[
  {
    "name": "1. Index of Dissimilarity",
    "formula": "ID = 100 ∑ | fi - fj | / 2 ∑ fi",
    "variables": "fi: percentage of workers in occupation i, fj: percentage of workers in occupation j",
    "units": "Percentage",
    "notes": "Used to measure the extent of dissimilarity between two occupations"
  },
  {
    "name": "2. Index of Dissimilarity (Simplified)",
    "formula": "ID = 200 ∑ | fi - fj |",
    "variables": "fi: percentage of workers in occupation i, fj: percentage of workers in occupation j",
    "units": "Percentage",
    "notes": "Used to measure the extent of dissimilarity between two occupations"
  },
  {
    "name": "3. Index of Dissimilarity (Special Case)",
    "formula": "ID = 100 ∑ | fi - fj |",
    "variables": "fi: percentage of workers in occupation i, fj: percentage of workers in occupation j",
    "units": "Percentage",
    "notes": "Used for special cases when total number of workers is even"
  },
  {
    "name": "4. Value Added per Employee (VAPE)",
    "formula": "VAPE = Total Value Added / Total Number of Employees",
    "variables": "Total Value Added: total value added by the industry, Total Number of Employees: total number of employees in the industry",
    "units": "Currency units",
    "notes": "Used to measure the productivity of an industry"
  },
  {
    "name": "5. Value Added per Person Engaged (VAPE)",
    "formula": "VAPE = Total Value Added / Total Number of Persons Engaged",
    "variables": "Total Value Added: total value added by the industry, Total Number of Persons Engaged: total number of persons engaged in the industry",
    "units": "Currency units",
    "notes": "Used to measure the productivity of an industry"
  },
  {
    "name": "6. Gross Value Added (GVA)",
    "formula": "GVA = Total Output - Intermediate Consumption",
    "variables": "Total Output: total output of the industry, Intermediate Consumption: intermediate consumption by the industry",
    "units": "Currency units",
    "notes": "Used to measure the value added by an industry"
  }
]
```

Note: As Tertiary and Quaternary Activities chapter in CBSE Class 12 Geography does not involve complex mathematical formulas, these formulas are based on industry productivity measures and dissimilarity indices.
